description: A comprehensive Laravel-based pharmacy management system for managing drugs, invoices, doctors, pharmacists, representatives, zones, warehouses, and generating various reports.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User authentication with role-based access control (admin, accountant). Login, logout, registration, password reset, email verification.

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard with sales statistics, risky zones, top performers, latest invoices, overdue invoices. Supports month/year filtering and line-specific dashboards.

features.name: Drugs Management
features.description: CRUD operations for drugs with name, price, and line (1 or 2). Includes sales history per drug.

features.name: Invoices Management
features.description: Complete invoice management with filtering, PDF generation, CSV export, warehouse stock deduction, doctor deal tracking.

features.name: Centers Management
features.description: CRUD for centers (medical centers/pharmacies) within provinces.

features.name: Pharmacists Management
features.description: CRUD for pharmacists linked to centers.

features.name: Doctors Management
features.description: CRUD for doctors linked to centers with deals and commissions.

features.name: Representatives Management
features.description: CRUD for sales and medical representatives.

features.name: Zones Management
features.description: CRUD for zones linked to warehouses, centers, and representatives. Each zone belongs to line 1 or 2.

features.name: Zone Expenses
features.description: Manage expenses for zones with date and amount tracking.

features.name: Doctor Deals
features.description: Manage doctor deals/commissions with target amounts, commission percentages, linked pharmacists and drugs.

features.name: Warehouses Management
features.description: Manage warehouses (main and sub) with drug inventory, stock addition, and returns.

features.name: Reports - Pharmacies
features.description: Generate reports for pharmacies by province, center, and pharmacist with sales statistics.

features.name: Reports - Representatives
features.description: Generate reports for sales and medical representatives showing performance and sales statistics.

features.name: Reports - Doctors
features.description: Generate reports for doctors with sales, commissions, and balance. Includes payment functionality.

features.name: Reports - Zone Risk
features.description: Generate zone risk reports showing zones with high risk ratios (discount + expense ratio) with export functionality.

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: User profile management for editing profile and updating password.
